heading: Purchase of books for law library
label: 135 Purchase of books for law library
text: The Librarian shall make the purchases of books for the law library, under the direction of and pursuant to the catalogue furnished him by the Chief Justice of the Supreme Court.
notes: CodificationR.S. § 84 derived from , .act July 14, 1832, ch. 221, § 44 Stat. 579
amendments: CodificationR.S. § 84 derived from , .act July 14, 1832, ch. 221, § 44 Stat. 579
